ApiFlow.Name: AF_U-020-Integration_Packing_List
ApiFlow.Description: Ajoute des informations de packing lists aux numéro OA associé au BL du conteneur Creation Date: 05/03/2026 Updated Date: Version: 1.1

Activity.Name: VerificationChampsObligatoires_Entete
Activity.Description: Vérification si les champs numéro de conteneur et numéro de fournisseur sont bien récupérer
Activity.JQScript:
# Validate IDP output for missing or empty header fields # Input: IDP_Output JSON # Output: Array of error messages for missing header fields only
# Extract document entities for validation and context (.document_entities // []) as $entities |
# Get container_number ($entities | map(select(.key == "container_number")) | .[0].value // "") as $container |
# Get supplier_number ($entities | map(select(.key == "supplier_number")) | .[0].value // "") as $supplier |
# Get table rows (.table_data | map(select(.name == "Lignes")) | .[0].rows // []) as $rows |
[ # Check for missing or empty container_number if ($container == null or $container == "" or $container == " ") then { Conteneur: "", PUNO: "", PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: "", Poids_Brut: "", Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "", Item_Number: "", Numero_OA: "", Fournisseur: (if $supplier != "" then $supplier else "inconnu" end), Document: (.document_name // "inconnu"), errorMessage: "Le numéro de conteneur (container_number) est manquant ou vide dans le document '\(.document_name // "inconnu")'" } else empty end,
# Check for missing or empty supplier_number if ($supplier == null or $supplier == "" or $supplier == " ") then { Conteneur: (if $container != "" then $container else "inconnu" end), PUNO: "", PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: "", Poids_Brut: "", Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "", Item_Number: "", Numero_OA: "", Fournisseur: "", Document: (.document_name // "inconnu"), errorMessage: "Le numéro de fournisseur (supplier_number) est manquant ou vide dans le document '\(.document_name // "inconnu")'" } else empty end,
# Check for missing or empty lines if ($rows | length) == 0 then { Conteneur: (if $container != "" then $container else "inconnu" end), PUNO: "", PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: "", Poids_Brut: "", Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "", Item_Number: "", Numero_OA: "", Fournisseur: (if $supplier != "" then $supplier else "inconnu" end), Document: (.document_name // "inconnu"), errorMessage: "Aucune ligne trouvée dans la table 'Lignes' du document '\(.document_name // "inconnu")'" } else empty end ] | select(length > 0)

Activity.Name: VerificationChampsObligatoires_Entete_Filtre
Activity.Description: Vérification si les champs numéro de conteneur et numéro de fournisseur sont bien récupérer

Activity.Name: SQRY_SearchHead_PPS360
Activity.Description: Création SQRY pour recherche API PPS360MI.SearchHead
Activity.JQScript:
# Construct string in format: "CFK1: container_number AND SUNO: supplier_number" # Input: PL_IDP_Output.json
# Extract container_number from document_entities (.document_entities[] | select(.key == "container_number") | .value) as $container |
# Extract supplier_number from document_entities (.document_entities[] | select(.key == "supplier_number") | .value) as $supplier |
# Construct the output string "CFK1: \($container) AND SUNO: \($supplier) SortBy:!DNDT"

Activity.Name: SearchHead_PPS360MI
Activity.Description: Récuperation du No de BL depuis PDNHEA
Activity.Operation: {"productName":"M3","productLogicalid":"infor.m3","method":"GET","path":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/PPS360MI/SearchHead","proxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/PPS360MI","restPath":"/SearchHead","endpointName":null,"resourceName":null,"description":null,"inputContentTypes":[],"outputContentTypes":["JSON"],"inputParameters":[{"name":"SQRY","description":"Search query(900)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":true,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"${SQRY_SearchHead_PPS360.output}","path":null},{"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"","path":null},{"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"locale","description":"The locale to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"timeZone","description":"The time zone to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"","path":null},{"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"excludeempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"returncols","description":"A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","type":"HEADER","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null}],"inputContentType":null,"outputContentType":"JSON","outputParameters":[{"name":"SearchHead","description":null,"type":"BODY","path":null,"value":null}]}

Activity.Name: RecuperationErreurNoBL
Activity.Description: Recuperation des erreur API: No Bon de livraison non retrouver ou fournisseur manquant
Activity.JQScript:
# Validate EXPORTMI PPS360MI SearchHead response and create error messages # Input: { request: query string (e.g., "CFK1: C1 AND SUNO: ADE0000001"), response: PPS360MI_SearchHead response } # Output: Array of error messages for failed queries, empty records, missing supplier or container
# Extract CFK1 (container) from request query - handles optional space after colon (.request | match("CFK1:\\s*([^ ]+)").captures[0].string // "inconnu") as $requestContainer |
# Extract SUNO (supplier) from request query - handles optional space after colon (.request | match("SUNO:\\s*([^ ]+)").captures[0].string // "inconnu") as $requestSupplier |
.response.results as $results |
[ $results[] |
# Check if the result has an errorMessage field if .errorMessage != null and .errorMessage != "" then { Conteneur: $requestContainer, PUNO: "", PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: "", Poids_Brut: "", Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "", Item_Number: "", Numero_OA: "", Fournisseur: $requestSupplier, Document: "", errorMessage: "Erreur lors de la recherche de l'en-tête du bon de livraison pour le conteneur '\($requestContainer)' et fournisseur '\($requestSupplier)': \(.errorMessage)" } # Check if the response has no records elif (.records | length) == 0 then { Conteneur: $requestContainer, PUNO: "", PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: "", Poids_Brut: "", Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "", Item_Number: "", Numero_OA: "", Fournisseur: $requestSupplier, Document: "", errorMessage: "Aucun enregistrement trouvé pour la recherche de l'en-tête du bon de livraison pour le conteneur '\($requestContainer)' et fournisseur '\($requestSupplier)'" } else # Check each record for empty supplier or container ( .records[] |
# Check if SUNO (supplier) is empty if (.SUNO == null or .SUNO == "" or .SUNO == " ") then { Conteneur: $requestContainer, PUNO: "", PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: "", Poids_Brut: "", Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "", Item_Number: "", Numero_OA: "", Fournisseur_Demande: $requestSupplier, Document: (.SUDO // "inconnu"), errorMessage: "Le numéro de fournisseur est vide pour le document: \(.SUDO // "inconnu"). Conteneur demandé: '\($requestContainer)'" } else empty end ) end ] | select(length > 0)

Activity.Name: VerificationErreurAPI
Activity.Description: Verification si erreur recuperation numero de BL

Activity.Name: GetBasicData_CRS620MI
Activity.Description: Récuperation du fournisseur pour avoir le SUTY
Activity.Operation: {"productName":"M3","productLogicalid":"infor.m3","method":"GET","path":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/CRS620MI/GetBasicData","proxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/CRS620MI","restPath":"/GetBasicData","endpointName":null,"resourceName":null,"description":null,"inputContentTypes":[],"outputContentTypes":["JSON"],"inputParameters":[{"name":"SUNO","description":"Supplier number(10)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":true,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"${SupplierNumber.output}","path":null},{"name":"CONO","description":"Company(3)","type":"QUERY","dataType":"number","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"locale","description":"The locale to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"timeZone","description":"The time zone to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"excludeempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"returncols","description":"A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","type":"HEADER","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null}],"inputContentType":null,"outputContentType":"JSON","outputParameters":[{"name":"GetBasicData","description":null,"type":"BODY","path":null,"value":null}]}

Activity.Name: prepareBulk_LstDetail_PPS360MI
Activity.Description: Creation format appelle API en bulk pour API PPS360MI LstDetails
Activity.JQScript:
# Extract SUTY from GetBasicData (.GetBasicData_CRS620MI.results[0].records[0].SUTY // "") as $suty |
# Get all SearchHead records (.SearchHead_PPS360MI.results[0].records // []) as $records |
# Find the maximum (most recent) DNDT ($records | map(.DNDT) | max) as $maxDNDT |
# Filter records to only those with the maximum DNDT ($records | map(select(.DNDT == $maxDNDT))) as $filteredRecords |
# Build bulk request with correct format { "program": "PPS360MI", "transactions": [ $filteredRecords[] | { "transaction": "LstDetail", "record": { "WHLO": .WHLO, "SUNO": .SUNO, "SUDO": .SUDO, "DNDT": .DNDT, "SUTY": $suty } } ] }

Activity.Name: LstDetail_PPS360MI
Activity.Description: Récupération des ligne de No de BL
Activity.Operation: {"productName":"M3","productLogicalid":"infor.m3","method":"POST","path":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute","proxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2","restPath":"/execute","endpointName":null,"resourceName":null,"description":null,"inputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentTypes":["JSON"],"inputParameters":[{"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"","path":null},{"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"locale","description":"Locale to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"timeZone","description":"Time zone to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"excludempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"positionkey","description":"Position to start reading from","type":"HEADER","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"body","description":"Since the request body is processed in a streaming fashion, ordering of attributes must be taken into account - the \"transactions\" attribute must be the last attribute of the request.","type":"BODY","dataType":null,"required":true,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"${prepareBulk_LstDetail_PPS360MI.output}","path":null}],"inputContentType":"JSON","outputContentType":"JSON","outputParameters":[{"name":"LstDetail_PPS360MI","description":null,"type":"BODY","path":null,"value":null}]}

Activity.Name: GetOABasedOnItem
Activity.Description: Filtraire sur les différentes lignes de BL, faire une matching avec les numéro OA en entrées et création requête API bulk pour mettre à jour MPLINE
Activity.JQScript:
# JQ Script to construct bulk API request for PPS200MI.UpdUserDefLine # Input format: { "input": <IDP_Output>, "LstDetails": <PPS360MI_LstDetail_Response> }
# Extract container_number from document_entities (.input.document_entities | map(select(.key == "container_number")) | .[0].value // "") as $container_number |
# Extract records from all LstDetails transactions (bulk response can have multiple transactions) (.LstDetails.results // [] | map(.records // []) | flatten) as $lstRecords |
# Get table rows from input (.input.table_data | map(select(.name == "Lignes")) | .[0].rows // []) as $inputRows |
# Build bulk API request { "program": "PPS200MI", "transactions": [ $inputRows[] | # Extract values from each row (.row | map({(.key): .value}) | add) as $rowData |
# Find matching record in LstDetails by ITNO = item_number ($lstRecords | map(select(.ITNO == $rowData.item_number)) | .[0] // null) as $matchedRecord |
# Only create transaction if we found a matching record select($matchedRecord != null) |
# Check if volume_cbm and poid_brut are not null or empty select($rowData.volume_cbm != null and $rowData.volume_cbm != "" and $rowData.volume_cbm != " ") | select($rowData.poid_brut != null and $rowData.poid_brut != "" and $rowData.poid_brut != " ") |
# Validate decimal format: must use period (.) not comma (,) as decimal separator select($rowData.volume_cbm | contains(",") | not) | select($rowData.poid_brut | contains(",") | not) |
# Convert to numbers and validate ($rowData.volume_cbm | tonumber) as $volume | ($rowData.poid_brut | tonumber) as $poids |
# Check if numbers are valid (not null after conversion) select($volume != null) | select($poids != null) |
# Convert UDN2 (poids_brut) to whole number ($poids | floor) as $poids_entier |
{ "transaction": "UpdUserDefLine", "record": { "PUNO": $matchedRecord.RIDN, "PNLI": $matchedRecord.PNLI, "PNLS": ($matchedRecord.PNLS // ""), "UDN1": ($volume | tostring), "UDN2": ($poids_entier | tostring), "UCA1": $container_number } } ] }

Activity.Name: RecuperationErreurMappageArticle
Activity.Description: Recuperation de mapping Article: Article depuis facture non present dans le BL
Activity.JQScript:
# Validate matching between IDP input and LstDetails response # Input format: { "input": <IDP_Output>, "LstDetails": <PPS360MI_LstDetail_Response> } # Output: Array of error messages for item_numbers that cannot be matched in LstDetails
# Extract container_number from document_entities for error context (.input.document_entities | map(select(.key == "container_number")) | .[0].value // "inconnu") as $container_number |
# Extract records from all LstDetails transactions (bulk response can have multiple transactions) (.LstDetails.results // [] | map(.records // []) | flatten) as $lstRecords |
# Get table rows from input (.input.table_data | map(select(.name == "Lignes")) | .[0].rows // []) as $inputRows |
# Check for unmatched items [ $inputRows[] | # Extract values from each row (.row | map({(.key): .value}) | add) as $rowData |
# Try to find matching record in LstDetails by ITNO = item_number ($lstRecords | map(select(.ITNO == $rowData.item_number)) | .[0] // null) as $matchedRecord |
# Output error if no match found if $matchedRecord == null then { Conteneur: $container_number, PUNO: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: ($rowData.volume_cbm // ""), Poids_Brut: ($rowData.poid_brut // ""), Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "", Item_Number: ($rowData.item_number // ""), Numero_OA: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), errorMessage: "Aucune correspondance trouvée dans les lignes de bon de livraison pour l'article '\($rowData.item_number)' du conteneur '\($container_number)'" } # Check if volume_cbm is missing or empty elif ($rowData.volume_cbm == null or $rowData.volume_cbm == "" or $rowData.volume_cbm == " ") then { Conteneur: $container_number, PUNO: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: "", Poids_Brut: ($rowData.poid_brut // ""), Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "volume_cbm", Item_Number: ($rowData.item_number // ""), Numero_OA: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), errorMessage: "Le volume CBM (volume_cbm) est manquant ou vide pour l'article '\($rowData.item_number)' du conteneur '\($container_number)'" } # Check if poid_brut is missing or empty elif ($rowData.poid_brut == null or $rowData.poid_brut == "" or $rowData.poid_brut == " ") then { Conteneur: $container_number, PUNO: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: ($rowData.volume_cbm // ""), Poids_Brut: "", Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "poid_brut", Item_Number: ($rowData.item_number // ""), Numero_OA: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), errorMessage: "Le poids brut (poid_brut) est manquant ou vide pour l'article '\($rowData.item_number)' du conteneur '\($container_number)'" } # Check if volume_cbm has incorrect decimal format (comma instead of period) elif ($rowData.volume_cbm | tostring | contains(",")) then { Conteneur: $container_number, PUNO: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: ($rowData.volume_cbm // ""), Poids_Brut: ($rowData.poid_brut // ""), Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "volume_cbm", Item_Number: ($rowData.item_number // ""), Numero_OA: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), errorMessage: "Le volume CBM (volume_cbm) '\($rowData.volume_cbm)' utilise une virgule au lieu d'un point comme séparateur décimal pour l'article '\($rowData.item_number)' du conteneur '\($container_number)'" } # Check if poid_brut has incorrect decimal format (comma instead of period) elif ($rowData.poid_brut | tostring | contains(",")) then { Conteneur: $container_number, PUNO: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: ($rowData.volume_cbm // ""), Poids_Brut: ($rowData.poid_brut // ""), Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "poid_brut", Item_Number: ($rowData.item_number // ""), Numero_OA: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), errorMessage: "Le poids brut (poid_brut) '\($rowData.poid_brut)' utilise une virgule au lieu d'un point comme séparateur décimal pour l'article '\($rowData.item_number)' du conteneur '\($container_number)'" } # Check if volume_cbm is a valid number elif ($rowData.volume_cbm | try tonumber catch null) == null then { Conteneur: $container_number, PUNO: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: ($rowData.volume_cbm // ""), Poids_Brut: ($rowData.poid_brut // ""), Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "volume_cbm", Item_Number: ($rowData.item_number // ""), Numero_OA: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), errorMessage: "Le volume CBM (volume_cbm) '\($rowData.volume_cbm)' n'est pas un nombre valide pour l'article '\($rowData.item_number)' du conteneur '\($container_number)'" } # Check if poid_brut is a valid number elif ($rowData.poid_brut | try tonumber catch null) == null then { Conteneur: $container_number, PUNO: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), PNLI: "", PNLS: "", Volume_CBM: ($rowData.volume_cbm // ""), Poids_Brut: ($rowData.poid_brut // ""), Code_Erreur: "", Champ_Erreur: "poid_brut", Item_Number: ($rowData.item_number // ""), Numero_OA: ($rowData.numero_oa // ""), errorMessage: "Le poids brut (poid_brut) '\($rowData.poid_brut)' n'est pas un nombre valide pour l'article '\($rowData.item_number)' du conteneur '\($container_number)'" } else empty end ] | select(length > 0)

Activity.Name: UpdUserDefLine_PPS200MI
Activity.Description: Mis à jour bulk dans la table MPLINE
Activity.Operation: {"productName":"M3","productLogicalid":"infor.m3","method":"POST","path":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute","proxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2","restPath":"/execute","endpointName":null,"resourceName":null,"description":null,"inputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentTypes":["JSON"],"inputParameters":[{"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"locale","description":"Locale to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"timeZone","description":"Time zone to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","type":"QUERY","dataType":"integer","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"excludempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","type":"QUERY","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","type":"QUERY","dataType":"boolean","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"positionkey","description":"Position to start reading from","type":"HEADER","dataType":"string","required":false,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":null,"path":null},{"name":"body","description":"Since the request body is processed in a streaming fashion, ordering of attributes must be taken into account - the \"transactions\" attribute must be the last attribute of the request.","type":"BODY","dataType":null,"required":true,"schema":null,"example":null,"value":"${GetOABasedOnItem.output}","path":null}],"inputContentType":"JSON","outputContentType":"JSON","outputParameters":[{"name":"UpdUserDefLine","description":null,"type":"BODY","path":null,"value":null}]}

Activity.Name: RecuperationErreurUpdUserDefLine
Activity.Description: Recuperation des erreur API: Erreur lors de la mis à jour la des lignes OA
Activity.JQScript:
# Validate PPS200MI UpdUserDefLine response and include LstDetail errors # Input format: { "response": <PPS200MI_UpdUserDefLine>, "request": <bulk_request>, "erreurLstDetail": <errors_array> } # Output: Array of error messages combining PPS200MI validation and LstDetail errors
# Get LstDetail errors (if any) (.erreurLstDetail // []) as $lstDetailErrors |
.request.transactions as $requests | .response.results as $results |
# Combine PPS200MI errors with LstDetail errors [ # First, check PPS200MI response for errors ( range($results | length) as $idx | $results[$idx] as $result | $requests[$idx] as $request |
# Extract request details for error context $request.record as $record |
# Check if the result has an errorMessage field if $result.errorMessage != null and $result.errorMessage != "" then { Conteneur: ($record.UCA1 // ""), PUNO: ($record.PUNO // ""), PNLI: ($record.PNLI // ""), PNLS: ($record.PNLS // ""), Volume_CBM: ($record.UDN1 // ""), Poids_Brut: ($record.UDN2 // ""), Code_Erreur: ($result.errorCode // ""), Champ_Erreur: ($result.errorField // ""), Item_Number: "", Numero_OA: ($record.PUNO // ""), errorMessage: "Erreur lors de la mise à jour de la ligne OA '\($record.PUNO // "inconnu")' ligne '\($record.PNLI // "inconnu")': \($result.errorMessage)" } else empty end ), # Then, include all LstDetail errors $lstDetailErrors[] ] | select(length > 0)

Activity.Name: VerificationErreurAPI_UpdUserDefLine
Activity.Description: Recuperation des erreur API: Erreur lors de la mis à jour la des lignes OA
